prompt: A surreal circular gathering of identical human figures standing in a perfect ring, each connected to several others by delicate silver threads. Every single figure gazes outward toward their neighbors — and every neighbor they look at has visibly more threads connected to them than the figure looking. Yet this is simultaneously true from every position in the ring. The center of the circle is completely empty. No figure has more threads than all others — yet every figure sees itself as the least connected. Painterly, dreamlike, warm amber and gold tones, slightly uncanny atmosphere. The threads glow faintly. The figures are silhouettes. No text. No numbers. No labels. Single frame. The feeling must be one of quiet impossibility — something is wrong but you cannot locate where.
visual_logic: A ring of figures where every figure looks at neighbors with more connections than itself — yet this is simultaneously true from every position, creating an impossible centerless hierarchy with no dominant node.
